73814.subject: Môžete prísť o účet, Oleh 🛑
73814.body:
alt

Dobrý deň, Oleh,

už to bude dlho, čo ste naposledy súťažili na RONDOgo. Bohužiaľ Vás
musíme upozorniť, že všetkým neaktívnym súťažiacim môžeme zmazať účet.

73810.subject: CFTC Clears Kalshi Perp, ICE Praises Hyperliquid
73810.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

These are today’s biggest stories:

* **[CFTC](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/cftc-approves-first-us-regulated-bitcoin-perpetual-futures)**[ clears first US-regulated bitcoin perp](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/cftc-approves-first-us-regulated-bitcoin-perpetual-futures)

* **[ICE chief](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/ice-chief-sprecher-calls-hyperliquid-bigger-than-nasdaq-as-hype-run-draws-tradfi-notice)**[ calls Hyperliquid 'bigger than Nasdaq' ](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/ice-chief-sprecher-calls-hyperliquid-bigger-than-nasdaq-as-hype-run-draws-tradfi-notice)

* **[Arbitrum Foundation](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/arbitrum-foundation-seeks-usd45m-funding-as-delegates-question-spending-above-dao-revenue)**[ seeks $45M ](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/arbitrum-foundation-seeks-usd45m-funding-as-delegates-question-spending-above-dao-revenue)

* **[Sui](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/sui-restarts-after-back-to-back-mainnet-halts)**[ restarts after two mainnet halts ](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/sui-restarts-after-back-to-back-mainnet-halts)

Two weeks ago, [CME and ICE were lobbying US regulators to crack down on Hyperliquid](https://thedefiant.io/newsletter/cme-and-ice-push-us-regulators-to-crack-down-on-hyperliquid). Today, [ICE chairman Jeffrey Sprecher called it "bigger than Nasdaq"](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/ice-chief-sprecher-calls-hyperliquid-bigger-than-nasdaq-as-hype-run-draws-tradfi-notice) from a Bernstein stage, and **HYPE ripped nearly 10%**, to its all-time high.

Bulls popped the champagne. 

On the same morning, the [CFTC approved Kalshi's BTCPERP](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/cftc-approves-first-us-regulated-bitcoin-perpetual-futures), the first bitcoin perpetual on a registered US exchange, and cleared Coinbase to route American customers into its offshore Deribit affiliate. Chairman Selig called it the US becoming "the crypto capital of the world." In short: **regulated perpetuals are now legal onshore. **

The thing the bulls are toasting is the **arrival of their own competition.**

Hyperliquid's deepest (not only) moat has always been r**egulatory arbitrage**. Perps are crypto's most-traded product, and also a product US traders couldn't legally touch at home. **Hyperliquid won by running the best venue in a market the incumbents were barred from entering. **The CFTC just unlocked that door.

Kalshi's BTCPERP runs the same funding-rate mechanism Hyperliquid, Binance, and Bybit have used since 2018. The regulated wrapper bolts on KYC, surveillance reporting, and registered-exchange cover, and now a compliant onshore venue exists for exactly the cohort Hyperliquid couldn't openly serve.

So re-read Sprecher's "compliment," this time as a competitor's field note. He asked regulators for a "level playing field." He's met the founders "multiple times." He says each side is "learning what the other does." He admitted IC

73809.subject: This Startup Is Building ChatGPT For Catholics
73809.body:
Forbes P.M.

Автор: Forbes


Автор: Forbes

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/startup-building-chatgpt-catholics-forbes-magazine-dapfc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BDVfhE6cHRae0S3R7nlEpzw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3hdXOhcRl5IYg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mprfdu44~ie-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mprfdu44-ie
  
Good evening, Matthew Harvey Sanders still remembers how confusing it was to become Catholic, so he built a chatbot trained on doctrine to help people understand the religion. When users began asking highly nuanced moral and personal questions, he began building his own AI model to help people get answers about the spiritual side of Catholicism. Learn more here. Thanks for reading! Kris Kornbluth Assistant Editor, Platforms & Curation More Recommended Reads Lauren Petracca How Nabis Became The Amazon Prime Of The Cannabis Industry They built this cannabis distributor from “two dudes with a truck” into the country’s biggest. Here's how. Win McNamee via Getty Images Treasury Launches Trump Accounts App As Funding Date Approaches The launch comes with a warning that, as activation begins, scammers are likely to try to take advantage of confusion around the new accounts.
Приєднатися до обговорення

Це повідомлення е-поштою адресовано учасникові Oleh Novosadov (I am 36 years old, and I am passionate about the world of cryptocurrencies and blockchain technologies. My professional interests include investing in cryptocurrencies, exploring blockchain, Web3, and the DeFi sector.)
